Faculty of Law Dean Prof Ömer Çınar was Elected as a Member of the Constitutional Court

20.04.2024

President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan elected Prof. Dr. Ömer Çınar as a Member of the Constitutional Court.

Our Faculty of Law Dean, Prof. Ömer Çınar, was selected among 3 candidates nominated by the General Assembly of Higher Education and appointed as a Member of the Constitutional Court.

The election decision was published in the Official Gazette dated April 20, 2024, with the signature of our President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

We congratulate our academician Prof. Ömer Çınar and wish him success in his new position.
